Notion综合协作系统.name: Notion综合协作系统
Notion综合协作系统.description: Arthur 的 Notion 综合协作系统。当需要操作 Notion 数据库(AllTask/项目管理/内容生产车间/CRM/日记等)、创建任务、更新项目、记录想法、管理客户信息时自动激活。⚠️ 当回答决策/财务/客户/项目类问题需要 Arthur 的真实数据时，必须主动调用此 Skill 查 Notion 最新信息，不要只靠 memory 快照！触发词：创建任务、更新项目、CRM、客户信息、AllTask、查一下Notion、财务数据、项目进度、帮我分析（涉及个人背景时）。包含四层架构规则、战略优先级系统、任务管理强制同步等核心协作机制。

claudeMdRefs.table: Notion 协作路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: 创建任务、更新项目、加个客户、记到 Notion、CRM、AllTask、内容车间

agent-browser.name: agent-browser
agent-browser.description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

agent-manager.name: agent-manager
agent-manager.description:
Arthur 的 AI 舰队总管。统一管理所有 AI Agent 资产：Claw bot、Claude Code 实例、Notion Agent、OpenCode 等。
⛔ 涉及 AI Agent 管理的问题，必须先调用此 Skill！
不调用 = Agent 散装管理、权限混乱、资源浪费。
触发词：Agent 管理、舰队状态、bot 管理、clawdbot、openclaw、Agent 分工、Agent 调度、Notion Agent、OpenCode、AI 资产、Agent 权限、Agent 部署。

claudeMdRefs.table: 设备与网络 Skill 路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: Agent 管理、舰队状态、bot 管理、clawdbot、openclaw、OpenClaw、铁壳、Agent 分工、Agent 调度、Notion Agent、OpenCode、AI 资产、Agent 权限、Agent 部署

ai-news.name: ai-news
ai-news.description: AI 资讯自动化系统。一键抓取最新 AI 新闻、比赛、工具、研究动态 + 深圳线下活动监控，输出到 Obsidian 笔记库。支持手动触发和定时运行。触发词："/ai-news"、"抓取AI资讯"、"AI新闻"、"今天有什么AI动态"、"有什么活动"、"深圳活动"。

ai-task-system.name: ai-task-system
ai-task-system.description: 【任务管理中枢】- Arthur 的跨 AI 工具任务管理系统。读取/更新每日任务、待办池、固定事项。

claudeMdRefs.table: 任务系统 Skill 路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: 任务、待办、backlog、今天做什么、完成了、搞定了、做完了、记一下、加个任务、还有什么要做、下一步、推进、进度、计划、安排、优先级、先放着、以后再说、别忘了、提醒我

ai-visibility-system.name: ai-visibility-system
ai-visibility-system.description:
name: ai-visibility-system
description: |
  【AI 运作可见性体系 v2.0】- 六标记体系（🗣️📖📚🔌🤖📤），让 Arthur 看到 AI 在幕后做了什么。

arthur-interaction-guide.name: arthur-interaction-guide
arthur-interaction-guide.description:
name: arthur-interaction-guide
description: |
  【Arthur 互动指南】- Arthur 的个人特质、深层模式、状态处理模板。帮 AI 理解 Arthur 的行为模式并给出合适回应。

article-screenshot.name: article-screenshot
article-screenshot.description: 文章配图截图助手。支持桌面、应用、网页、区域截图，自动保存到项目目录。混合模式：AI 建议配图位置，用户确认后截图。触发词："截图"、"截个图"、"这里需要配图"、"screenshot"。

article-workflow.name: article-workflow
article-workflow.description:
全局写作工作流编排器。从任何项目、任何上下文一键启动完整写作流程。
自动路由到写作专用仓库，动态加载对应平台的写作模板和 SOP。

claudeMdRefs.table: 写作工作流 Skill 路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: /write、写文章、写公众号、写一篇、发公众号、写小红书、写推特、写 X、开始写作、写作流程

artifacts-builder.name: artifacts-builder
artifacts-builder.description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui). Use for complex artifacts requiring state management, routing, or shadcn/ui components - not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.

baoyu-article-illustrator.name: baoyu-article-illustrator
baoyu-article-illustrator.description: Analyzes article structure, identifies positions requiring visual aids, generates illustrations with Type × Style two-dimension approach. Use when user asks to "illustrate article", "add images", "generate images for article", or "为文章配图".

baoyu-comic.name: baoyu-comic
baoyu-comic.description: Knowledge comic creator supporting multiple art styles and tones. Creates original educational comics with detailed panel layouts and sequential image generation. Use when user asks to create "知识漫画", "教育漫画", "biography comic", "tutorial comic", or "Logicomix-style comic".

baoyu-compress-image.name: baoyu-compress-image
baoyu-compress-image.description: Compresses images to WebP (default) or PNG with automatic tool selection. Use when user asks to "compress image", "optimize image", "convert to webp", or reduce image file size.

baoyu-cover-image.name: baoyu-cover-image
baoyu-cover-image.description: Generates article cover images with 5 dimensions (type, palette, rendering, text, mood) combining 9 color palettes and 6 rendering styles. Supports cinematic (2.35:1), widescreen (16:9), and square (1:1) aspects. Use when user asks to "generate cover image", "create article cover", "make cover", or mentions "封面图".

baoyu-danger-gemini-web.name: baoyu-danger-gemini-web
baoyu-danger-gemini-web.description: Generates images and text via reverse-engineered Gemini Web API. Supports text generation, image generation from prompts, reference images for vision input, and multi-turn conversations. Use when other skills need image generation backend, or when user requests "generate image with Gemini", "Gemini text generation", or needs vision-capable AI generation.

baoyu-danger-x-to-markdown.name: baoyu-danger-x-to-markdown
baoyu-danger-x-to-markdown.description: Converts X (Twitter) tweets and articles to markdown with YAML front matter. Uses reverse-engineered API requiring user consent. Use when user mentions "X to markdown", "tweet to markdown", "save tweet", or provides x.com/twitter.com URLs for conversion.

baoyu-image-gen.name: baoyu-image-gen
baoyu-image-gen.description: AI image generation with OpenAI and Google APIs. Supports text-to-image, reference images, aspect ratios, and parallel generation (recommended 4 concurrent subagents). Use when user asks to generate, create, or draw images.

baoyu-infographic.name: baoyu-infographic
baoyu-infographic.description: Generates professional infographics with 20 layout types and 17 visual styles. Analyzes content, recommends layout×style combinations, and generates publication-ready infographics. Use when user asks to create "infographic", "信息图", "visual summary", or "可视化".

baoyu-post-to-wechat.name: baoyu-post-to-wechat
baoyu-post-to-wechat.description: Posts content to WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) via Chrome CDP automation. Supports article posting (文章) with full markdown formatting and image-text posting (图文) with multiple images. Use when user mentions "发布公众号", "post to wechat", "微信公众号", or "图文/文章".

baoyu-post-to-x.name: baoyu-post-to-x
baoyu-post-to-x.description: Posts content and articles to X (Twitter). Supports regular posts with images/videos and X Articles (long-form Markdown). Uses real Chrome with CDP to bypass anti-automation. Use when user asks to "post to X", "tweet", "publish to Twitter", or "share on X".

baoyu-slide-deck.name: baoyu-slide-deck
baoyu-slide-deck.description: Generates professional slide deck images from content. Creates outlines with style instructions, then generates individual slide images. Use when user asks to "create slides", "make a presentation", "generate deck", "slide deck", or "PPT".

baoyu-url-to-markdown.name: baoyu-url-to-markdown
baoyu-url-to-markdown.description: Fetch any URL and convert to markdown using Chrome CDP. Supports two modes - auto-capture on page load, or wait for user signal (for pages requiring login). Use when user wants to save a webpage as markdown.

baoyu-xhs-images.name: baoyu-xhs-images
baoyu-xhs-images.description: Generates Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) infographic series with 9 visual styles and 6 layouts. Breaks content into 1-10 cartoon-style images optimized for XHS engagement. Use when user mentions "小红书图片", "XHS images", "RedNote infographics", "小红书种草", or wants social media infographics for Chinese platforms.

best-minds-最强大脑.name: best-minds-最强大脑
best-minds-最强大脑.description: 最强大脑（源自 Karpathy 观点）：不问"你怎么看"，而是问"世界上谁最懂这个？TA 会怎么说？"。

claudeMdRefs.table: 思维增强 Skill 路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: 怎么做X、最佳实践、帮我想想、给我建议、怎么提高、怎么优化、该怎么办、有什么好方法、如何突破、从0到1

book-cowriter.name: book-cowriter
book-cowriter.description:
《用AI学AI》书稿协作 skill。聊天即写书——识别对话中的书相关想法，智能路由到正确章节，融入书稿。
⛔ 当对话涉及"这本书"、"书稿"、"融入"、"加到书里"、"知识点"、"这个概念可以写进去"时，必须调用！
不调用 = 想法丢失、章节错位、书稿进度停滞。
触发词：书、这本书、书稿、融入、加到书里、知识点、写进去、第X章、用AI学AI。

branch-one-step-push-merge.name: branch-one-step-push-merge
branch-one-step-push-merge.description: 分支功能开发完成以后，推送验证再合并。一键完成 commit → push → 创建 PR → 等待 CI 部署 → 自动检查预览 → 用户确认 → 合并 → 切回 main → 清理分支的完整流程。触发词："/branch-one-step-push-merge"、"分支合并"、"推送合并"、"一键发布"。

canvas-design.name: canvas-design
canvas-design.description: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.

changelog-generator.name: changelog-generator
changelog-generator.description: Automatically creates user-facing changelogs from git commits by analyzing commit history, categorizing changes, and transforming technical commits into clear, customer-friendly release notes. Turns hours of manual changelog writing into minutes of automated generation.

chinese-humor.name: chinese-humor
chinese-humor.description:
中文幽默注入器。把枯燥文字/对话改写成有趣的，或帮你现写带幽默感的内容。
⛔ 不要自己瞎搞幽默！没有技法 = 硬凑、尬笑、踩雷。调用此 Skill = 有理论+有技法+有禁区边界。
触发词：幽默、笑点、搞笑、加梗、写段子、有趣一点、太无聊了、去AI味（幽默版）、脱口秀、相声、抖包袱、谐音、自嘲、冷幽默、蔫坏。

clash-manager.name: clash-manager
clash-manager.description: Arthur 的 Clash Verge 代理配置管理专家 - 代理规则管理、配置热更新、DNS/TUN 优化、网络性能监控、故障排查。

claudeMdRefs.table: 设备与网络 Skill 路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: 网络慢、代理、VPN、Clash、测速、网速、IP检测、翻墙、节点、机场、Merge.yaml、规则、DNS、TUN、fake-ip

claude-code-upgrader.name: claude-code-upgrader
claude-code-upgrader.description: Claude Code 升级管理器 - Arthur 唯一的 Claude Code 版本管理 skill。

code-comment-guide.name: code-comment-guide
code-comment-guide.description:
name: code-comment-guide
description: |
  【代码注释规范】- Arthur 的三层注释体系 + 注释管理规则。写代码/改代码时的注释标准。

concept-explainer.name: concept-explainer
concept-explainer.description:
新概念通俗解码器。当对话中出现用户可能不理解的新工具/新技术/新概念时，自动用生活比喻+ASCII图示+对比表解释清楚。
⛔ 检测到新概念就必须触发！不触发 = 用户一脸懵逼、被迫追问、浪费对话轮次。
自动触发条件：Claude 在回答中引入新工具、新协议、新框架、新技术概念时，自动嵌入通俗解释。
触发词：「是什么」「介绍一下」「这是啥」「不懂」「解释一下」「什么意思」「没听过」「第一次见」。

debug-protocol.name: debug-protocol
debug-protocol.description:
name: debug-protocol
description: |
  【调试规范】- Arthur 的多轮调试规范：先梳理，后动手。调试响应模板 + 代码审美标准。

deploying-to-production.name: deploying-to-production
deploying-to-production.description: Automates GitHub repository creation and Vercel deployment for Next.js websites. Use when deploying new websites, pushing to production, setting up CI/CD pipelines, or when the user mentions deployment, GitHub, Vercel, or going live.

device-manager.name: device-manager
device-manager.description: Arthur 的设备与服务器管理员 - 管理所有设备连接、SSH 密钥、Tailscale 网络、服务器运维。

claudeMdRefs.table: 设备与网络 Skill 路由

doc-coauthoring.name: doc-coauthoring
doc-coauthoring.description: Guide users through a structured workflow for co-authoring documentation. Use when user wants to write documentation, proposals, technical specs, decision docs, or similar structured content. This workflow helps users efficiently transfer context, refine content through iteration, and verify the doc works for readers. Trigger when user mentions writing docs, creating proposals, drafting specs, or similar documentation tasks.

docx.name: docx
docx.description: "Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks"

douyin-content-system.name: douyin-content-system
douyin-content-system.description:
【抖音短视频内容系统】- Arthur 的抖音知识库 + 创作工作流。涵盖起号、脚本、口播、流量、爆款、变现六大模块。
⛔ 涉及抖音/短视频/口播/起号/脚本就必须调用此 Skill！不调用 = 方法论散落各处、重复踩坑、创作没有体系。
触发词：抖音、短视频、口播、起号、脚本、Douyin、TikTok、录视频、拍视频、视频选题、视频文案、抖音运营、涨粉、流量、爆款视频。

claudeMdRefs.table: 写作工作流 Skill 路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: 抖音、短视频、起号、录视频、拍视频、抖音运营、涨粉、爆款视频、流量、合规

file-hub.name: file-hub
file-hub.description: 个人文件管理系统。通过软链接 + 标签 + Smart Folder + Finder 备注，实现多维度文件管理。支持添加文件到 Hub、管理标签、查看状态、添加备注、创建 Smart Folder。

find-community-skills.name: find-community-skills
find-community-skills.description: 搜索社区开源 Skill 生态，仅搜索、仅浏览、绝不安装。触发词："找skill"、"有没有现成的skill"、"社区skill"、"skills.sh"、"搜skill"、"find skills"。

claudeMdRefs.table: 安全防护 Skill 路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: 找 skill、有没有现成的 skill、社区 skill、搜 skill

fork-id-copy.name: fork-id-copy
fork-id-copy.description: 把当前对话的 fork 命令复制到剪贴板。去新窗口 Cmd+V 就能打开一个独立副本。

frontend-design.name: frontend-design
frontend-design.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

google-official-seo-guide.name: google-official-seo-guide
google-official-seo-guide.description: Official Google SEO guide covering search optimization, best practices, Search Console, crawling, indexing, and improving website search visibility based on official Google documentation

headline-generator.name: headline-generator
headline-generator.description:
标题与摘要生成器。专注"一句话标题"和"120字摘要"的生成与打磨。
基于 dontbesilent 方法论（对比结构、数字法、反转钩子）+ 心理触发机制。

human-reaction-simulator-人性模拟器.name: human-reaction-simulator-人性模拟器
human-reaction-simulator-人性模拟器.description:
人性模拟器。模拟一个真实人类在看到内容时的本能反应——恐惧、兴奋、无聊、想划走、想转发……
不是"分析工具"，是"虚拟读者"。你丢内容给它，它告诉你一个活人会怎么反应。
⛔ 发内容之前不让一个"人"先看一遍 = 盲发。写完 → 必须调用此 Skill。
触发词："模拟读者"、"假装你是读者"、"人会怎么看"、"模拟人"、"人性模拟"、"帮我看看这个"、"测一下效果"、"这个能打吗"、"human sim"、"驱动力"、"流量密码"。

humanizer.name: humanizer
humanizer.description:
Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Use when editing or reviewing
text to make it sound more natural and human-written. Based on Wikipedia's
comprehensive "Signs of AI writing" guide. Detects and fixes patterns including:
inflated symbolism, promotional language, superficial -ing analyses, vague
attributions, em dash overuse, rule of three, AI vocabulary words, negative
parallelisms, and excessive conjunctive phrases.

image-renamer.name: image-renamer
image-renamer.description: 【图片改名】- 处理笔记中的图片引用时，顺手将图片重命名为描述性文件名，保留原始文件名信息。

claudeMdRefs.table: Obsidian Skill 路由表
claudeMdRefs.trigger: 碰到图片引用（`![[xxx.png]]`）时自动触发，不需要用户主动说

internationalizing-websites.name: internationalizing-websites
internationalizing-websites.description: Adds multi-language support to Next.js websites with proper SEO configuration including hreflang tags, localized sitemaps, and language-specific content. Use when adding new languages, setting up i18n, optimizing for international SEO, or when user mentions localization, translation, multi-language, or specific languages like Japanese, Korean, Chinese.

json-canvas.name: json-canvas
json-canvas.description: 创建和编辑 Obsidian Canvas 文件（.canvas）。Use when working with .canvas files, creating visual canvases, mind maps, flowcharts, or when the user mentions Canvas in Obsidian. 触发词：canvas、画布、思维导图、.canvas 文件、obsidian canvas、json canvas。

mcp-builder.name: mcp-builder
mcp-builder.description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Use when building MCP servers to integrate external APIs or services, whether in Python (FastMCP) or Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK).

media-downloader.name: media-downloader
media-downloader.description:
智能媒体下载器。根据用户描述自动搜索和下载图片、视频片段，支持视频自动剪辑。
Smart media downloader. Automatically search and download images/video clips based on user description, with auto-trimming support.
触发方式 Triggers: "下载图片", "找视频", "download media", "download images", "find video", "/media"

mermaid-diagram.name: mermaid-diagram
mermaid-diagram.description: Creates syntactically correct mermaid diagrams (flowchart, sequenceDiagram, classDiagram, stateDiagram, erDiagram, gantt, mindmap) following official specifications. Prevents common errors like special characters in labels, subgraph syntax, note misuse, and reserved words. Use when creating or editing mermaid diagrams in documentation or design files.

mermaid-validator.name: mermaid-validator
mermaid-validator.description:
【Mermaid 验证器】- 所有 Mermaid 代码必须经过 mmdc 验证才能输出给用户。
⛔ 不验证直接输出 = 语法错误 = 用户在 Obsidian 看到报错 = 搞砸了。
⛔ 不要自信"这次语法肯定对"——你已经因为 YAML front-matter、中文未加引号等问题多次翻车。
【触发场景】流程图、时序图、架构图、任何 mermaid 代码块、用户说"画个图"、双版本输出中的 Mermaid 部分。
【强制流程】写代码 → 派子 agent 验证 → 通过才输出 → 失败则子 agent 自动修复（最多3次）。

mirror-debate.name: mirror-debate
mirror-debate.description: 照妖镜 - 正反辩论思维工具。通过结构化的正反辩论，帮助用户看清问题的多个维度，发现思维盲点。

naming-master.name: naming-master
naming-master.description:
【全能命名师】- 统一管理所有起名场景：笔记、文件、项目、Skill、MCP、产品、品牌、标题、Session、代码变量、Agent、课程。
⛔ 任何需要"起名/改名/命名/重命名"的场景，必须先加载此 Skill！不调用 = 命名风格不统一、认知负担高、将来找不到、品牌辨识度低。
⚠️ **隐式触发规则**：当你正在创建新文件、新笔记、新项目、新 Skill、新 Agent、新仓库时，即使用户没说"起名"，也必须按此 Skill 的规则命名。
触发词：起名、命名、取名、改名、叫什么、名字、naming、rename、怎么命名、名字不好、名字太长、名字太短、文件名、笔记名、项目名、仓库名、品牌名、产品名、课程名、Agent名、标题、重命名。

Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient."

untitled folder.name: untitled folder

# Ralph Loop 提示词生成器
## 概述
这个 skill 帮助用户为 Claude Code 的 ralph-loop 插件生成高质量、结构化的提示词。它会分析用户的任务需求，自动生成包含完整步骤、错误处理和完成条件的 ralph-loop 命令。

video-digester.name: video-digester
video-digester.description:
视频消化器。丢视频链接 = 提取字幕 + 按你的角度消化内容。支持 YouTube、B站。
⛔ 当用户消息中包含 youtube.com 或 bilibili.com 链接，且意图是"看看讲了什么"/"总结一下"/"学习"时，必须调用此 Skill！
不调用 = 用户只能自己看完整个视频，浪费 20-60 分钟。
触发词：视频链接、帮我看看这个视频、总结一下这个视频、这个视频讲了什么、消化一下、video digest。
⚠️ 注意区分：用户说"下载视频"→ 用 video-downloader，用户说"看看讲了什么"→ 用本 skill。

video-downloader.name: video-downloader
video-downloader.description: Download YouTube videos with customizable quality and format options. Use this skill when the user asks to download, save, or grab YouTube videos. Supports various quality settings (best, 1080p, 720p, 480p, 360p), multiple formats (mp4, webm, mkv), and audio-only downloads as MP3.

Use for complex artifacts requiring state management, routing, or shadcn/ui components - not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.

⚠️ **强制调用规则**：任何涉及以下关键词的问题，必须先加载此 skill：
网站、站点、Vercel、部署状态、上线、挂了、报错、回滚、域名、网站慢、打不开、SSL、巡检、网站安全。

数字桩工作台.description:
# 数字桩工作台
【数字桩工作台】- tmux session 全生命周期管理：智能命名（数字桩编号 + 右脑记忆画面）、崩溃恢复、平铺展示。
⛔ 涉及 tmux session 操作就必须调用此 Skill！不调用 = 编号混乱 + 没有记忆画面 + 恢复不了。

claudeMdRefs.table: 设备与网络 Skill 路由
claudeMdRefs.trigger: 开个 tmux、新建 session、tmux 新会话、tmux rename、重命名会话、数字桩、恢复对话、崩溃了、平铺打开、tile、会话管理

真人化写作-去AI味.name: 真人化写作-去AI味
真人化写作-去AI味.description: Transform AI-written content into natural, conversational writing that sounds like a real person talking. Use when writing articles, speeches, or any content that needs to feel authentic and engaging. Focuses on rhythm (burstiness), diversity (perplexity), and emotional warmth. Triggers include "写公众号", "说人话", "去AI味", "口语化".

plugin-official/knowledge-capture.name: knowledge-capture
plugin-official/knowledge-capture.description: Transforms conversations and discussions into structured documentation pages in Notion. Captures insights, decisions, and knowledge from chat context, formats appropriately, and saves to wikis or databases with proper organization and linking for easy discovery.

plugin-official/meeting-intelligence.name: meeting-intelligence
plugin-official/meeting-intelligence.description: Prepares meeting materials by gathering context from Notion, enriching with Claude research, and creating both an internal pre-read and external agenda saved to Notion. Helps you arrive prepared with comprehensive background and structured meeting docs.

plugin-official/research-documentation.name: research-documentation
plugin-official/research-documentation.description: Searches across your Notion workspace, synthesizes findings from multiple pages, and creates comprehensive research documentation saved as new Notion pages. Turns scattered information into structured reports with proper citations and actionable insights.

plugin-official/spec-to-implementation.name: spec-to-implementation
plugin-official/spec-to-implementation.description: Turns product or tech specs into concrete Notion tasks that Claude code can implement. Breaks down spec pages into detailed implementation plans with clear tasks, acceptance criteria, and progress tracking to guide development from requirements to completion.

plugin-official/frontend-design.name: frontend-design
plugin-official/frontend-design.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

plugin-official/slack-messaging.name: slack-messaging
plugin-official/slack-messaging.description: Guidance for composing well-formatted, effective Slack messages using mrkdwn syntax

plugin-official/slack-search.name: slack-search
plugin-official/slack-search.description: Guidance for effectively searching Slack to find messages, files, channels, and people

plugin-official/deploy.name: deploy
plugin-official/deploy.description: Deploy applications to Vercel. Use when the user says "deploy", "deploy to Vercel", "push to production", "deploy my app", or "go live".

plugin-official/logs.name: logs
plugin-official/logs.description: View Vercel deployment logs. Use when the user says "show logs", "check logs", "vercel logs", or "what went wrong with the deployment".

plugin-official/setup.name: setup
plugin-official/setup.description: Set up Vercel CLI and project configuration. Use when the user says "set up Vercel", "configure Vercel", "link to Vercel", or "vercel init".

planning-with-files.name: planning-with-files
planning-with-files.description: Implements Manus-style file-based planning for complex tasks. Creates task_plan.md, findings.md, and progress.md. Use when starting complex multi-step tasks, research projects, or any task requiring >5 tool calls. Now with automatic session recovery after /clear.

plugin-community/brainstorming.name: brainstorming
plugin-community/brainstorming.description: "You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation."

plugin-community/dispatching-parallel-ag.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
plugin-community/dispatching-parallel-ag.description: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies

plugin-community/executing-plans.name: executing-plans
plugin-community/executing-plans.description: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints

plugin-community/finishing-a-development.name: finishing-a-development-branch
plugin-community/finishing-a-development.description: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work - guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup

plugin-community/receiving-code-review.name: receiving-code-review
plugin-community/receiving-code-review.description: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions, especially if feedback seems unclear or technically questionable - requires technical rigor and verification, not performative agreement or blind implementation

plugin-community/requesting-code-review.name: requesting-code-review
plugin-community/requesting-code-review.description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements

plugin-community/subagent-driven-develop.name: subagent-driven-development
plugin-community/subagent-driven-develop.description: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session

plugin-community/systematic-debugging.name: systematic-debugging
plugin-community/systematic-debugging.description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes

plugin-community/test-driven-development.name: test-driven-development
plugin-community/test-driven-development.description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code

plugin-community/using-git-worktrees.name: using-git-worktrees
plugin-community/using-git-worktrees.description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - creates isolated git worktrees with smart directory selection and safety verification

plugin-community/using-superpowers.name: using-superpowers
plugin-community/using-superpowers.description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions

plugin-community/verification-before-com.name: verification-before-completion
plugin-community/verification-before-com.description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always

plugin-community/writing-plans.name: writing-plans
plugin-community/writing-plans.description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

plugin-community/writing-skills.name: writing-skills
plugin-community/writing-skills.description: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment

slack-messaging.name: slack-messaging
slack-messaging.description: Guidance for composing well-formatted, effective Slack messages using mrkdwn syntax

slack-search.name: slack-search
slack-search.description: Guidance for effectively searching Slack to find messages, files, channels, and people
